accepted.description: Count of bounces accepted and queued for downstream handling.

ignored.description: Count of bounces dropped (e.g. envelope-to did not match any mailbox).

ok.description: Always true on a 200; providers retry on non-2xx.

raw.description: User-set values only (null when the workspace has never customised). Null fields signal "not customised — falling through to default".

resolved.description: Fully-resolved tokens every render uses. The frontend reads this for previews so what the editor shows == what recipients get.

return_to.description: URL the workspace user should land on after the GitHub OAuth flow completes. Must be a same-origin or productcraft.co URL — anything else is rejected to keep the callback from being an open-redirect.

authorize_url.description: Browser redirects here to start the GitHub OAuth flow.

intent.description: How the workspace plans to use this domain. Drives which DNS records the cron treats as required (and so the auto-flip to active).

local_part.description: Local part of the address (portion before @)

purpose.description: Purpose of this record (ownership, sending policy, etc.).

value.description: Record value the customer must publish.

dkim_public_key.description: Public DKIM key in PEM form (private half stays server-side).

dns_check_results.description: Snapshot of the most recent DNS check (any shape).

dns_instructions.description: DNS records the customer needs to publish to verify ownership + sending.

dns_provider.description: Identifier from the wizard provider list, or null when not chosen.

intent.description: How the workspace intends to use this domain.

test_address.description: Convenience accessor for the test-email mailbox address on this domain.

data.description: Null when this workspace has not configured SMTP.

credentials_redacted.description: Provider's redacted credential view — public identifiers + a 'token_present' boolean. Secrets NEVER round-trip.

last_error.description: Surfaced when status is 'error' — last failure message.

last_synced_at.description: When the last successful sync ran. null until first success.

settings.description: Provider-specific non-secret settings (e.g. selected repo / branch / path).

last_error.description: Surfaced when status is 'error' — last failure message.

last_synced_at.description: When the last successful sync ran. null until first success.

settings.description: Provider-specific non-secret settings (e.g. selected repo / branch / path).

score.description: 0-100, higher is better. ≥90 "looks great"; <70 "likely to spam-folder".

data.description: Sample data to render variables with.

raw_object_key.description: Storage object key for the raw RFC5322 .eml.
Storage object key for the raw RFC5322 .eml.

points.description: Dense day-bucketed counts for the requested window. Days with zero messages still appear with `count: 0`.

has_more.description: True iff another page exists; if true, pass `next_cursor` on the next request.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when no more pages.

body_html.description: Cleartext HTML body. Null when the workspace has `redact_bodies = true`.

body_text.description: Cleartext text body. Null when the workspace has `redact_bodies = true`.

disabled_at.description: Set when auto-disabled after sustained failure.

domain_id.description: Null for the workspace-default config; set for a per-domain override.

prev_signing_secret_active.description: True while a previous signing secret is still being honoured (24h grace after rotation).

signing_secret_hint.description: Last 4 chars of the active signing secret.

disabled_at.description: Set when auto-disabled after sustained failure.

domain_id.description: Null for the workspace-default config; set for a per-domain override.

prev_signing_secret_active.description: True while a previous signing secret is still being honoured (24h grace after rotation).

signing_secret.description: Plaintext signing secret. Returned once on create / rotate; never reconstructable.

signing_secret_hint.description: Last 4 chars of the active signing secret.

has_more.description: True iff another page exists; if true, pass `next_cursor` on the next request.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. `null` when no more pages are available.

data.description: Sample data to render variables with.
Data object to render into the template

extras.description: Extra key/value tokens addressable as {{brand.extras.<key>}} in templates.

font_stack.example: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

messages.description: Up to 100 messages to render and enqueue in a single call. Each is processed independently — partial successes are allowed.

data.description: Template data passed into the Handlebars render.

from.description: From address. Must be authorized to send on its domain.

idempotency_key.description: Optional per-row idempotency key. Same dedupe namespace as the `Idempotency-Key` request header.

subject.description: Optional override for the rendered subject. Falls back to the template subject.

id.description: Outbound message id when accepted; absent on reject.

data.description: Data object to render into the template

subject.description: Subject override (optional; uses template subject otherwise)

to.description: To email address or list of addresses

bounce_webhook_secret.description: Per-workspace bounce-webhook secret. Embedded in the URL the user pastes into provider dashboards.

bounce_webhook_url.description: Fully-qualified webhook URL the user pastes into their provider.

domain_id.description: Null for the workspace-default config, set for a per-domain override.

password.description: Always null on the wire — the stored ciphertext is never returned.

message.example: Authentication failed — check the username and password.

source.description: Where this row came from. 'manual' for UI-authored, 'github' for rows maintained by the workspace GitHub integration sync. Migration 0020.

source_ref.description: Stable provider pointer used by the editor to build "Open on GitHub →" links. Shape: `github:<owner>/<repo>@<branch>:<path-in-repo>`.

source_synced_at.description: When the sync service last wrote this row. null for manual rows.

variables_schema.description: Declared variable schema; arbitrary JSON or null if not configured.

data.description: Variables auto-detected from the saved template body + subject (Handlebars expressions, dotted paths preserved).
Variable values to render into the template. Keys correspond to the dotted paths returned by the /variables endpoint.

from.description: From email address. Must be on a verified domain owned by the workspace, same as a normal send.

to.description: Recipient address for the test email. Suppression-list and rate-limit checks are bypassed for test sends, so a recently-bounced address is still reachable for QA.

count.description: Count of messages in this bucket.

background_color.description: Page background — the area outside the email card.

brand_name.description: Display name shown in the email header (falls back to your workspace display name if not set).

button_radius.description: CSS length value for button border-radius (e.g. "6px", "0", "9999px" for fully round).

container_max_width.description: Maximum width of the email card. Bulletproof tables max-out at this.

extras.description: Extra key/value tokens addressable as {{brand.extras.<key>}} in templates. Use for marketing strings, secondary accent colors, etc.

font_stack.description: CSS font-family stack. Email clients can't use webfonts reliably — list system fonts in fallback order.

footer_address.description: Postal address line for compliance footers (CAN-SPAM, etc.). Plain text, displayed verbatim.

footer_html.description: Custom HTML to render in the email footer. Inline styles only — no <style> tags. Used by templates that opt into `{{> bp.footer}}`.

logo_url.description: Public URL of your logo. Recommended: PNG/SVG, ≤200px tall, hosted on a domain you control or any CDN reachable at send time.

muted_text_color.description: Muted text color for footers + secondary copy.

primary_color.description: Primary brand color. Used for buttons, links, and accent strokes. Hex string (e.g. #2d29d7).

secondary_color.description: Secondary brand color, typically darker than primary. Used for hover states + secondary accents.

social_links.description: Map of social-platform → URL. Recognized keys: twitter, x, linkedin, github, instagram, facebook, youtube, tiktok, mastodon, bluesky, web.

dns_provider.description: Identifier from the wizard's provider list. Free-form so we can ship new entries without a migration. NULL clears the choice.

redact_bodies.description: When true, /messages/:id/body returns null body_html + body_text even to callers with envoi.message.body.read. Defaults to false.

url.description: Destination URL. Must be absolute https:// with a public TLD.

from_email.description: Default From email address. Must be authorized to send on the chosen domain.

from_name.description: Default From name on outbound messages.

password.description: SMTP password. Stored encrypted at rest; never returned by GET endpoints.

port.description: SMTP server port (commonly 587 for STARTTLS, 465 for implicit TLS).

secure.description: Whether to use implicit TLS (true → port 465 style). For STARTTLS on 587, set false.

username.description: SMTP username. May be omitted alongside password for anonymous SMTP (e.g. postfix on a private network); otherwise both are required.

kind.description: Kind: "template" (sendable email; default), "layout" (chrome wrapper referenced via {{> layout.<name>}}), "partial" (reusable block referenced via {{> partial.<name>}}). Cannot be changed after create — delete + recreate to switch kinds.

name.description: Unique template name within the app (lowercase letters, digits, underscore, hyphen)

subject.description: Subject line (Handlebars). Layouts and partials ignore this field — they are not standalone-sendable. Pass an empty string for those.

tags.description: Workspace-scoped labels for organizing templates. Free-form strings; the editor surfaces existing tags as autocomplete.

variables_schema.description: Declared variable schema. Shape: `{version:1, vars:{<name>:{type, required?, default?, options?}}}`. When set, render + send validate the payload against the schema and 400 with descriptive errors on mismatch.

from_email.description: Default From email address. Must be authorized to send on the chosen domain.

from_name.description: Default From name on outbound messages.

password.description: SMTP password. Stored encrypted at rest; never returned by GET endpoints.

port.description: SMTP server port (commonly 587 for STARTTLS, 465 for implicit TLS).

secure.description: Whether to use implicit TLS (true → port 465 style). For STARTTLS on 587, set false.

username.description: SMTP username. May be omitted alongside password for anonymous SMTP (e.g. postfix on a private network); otherwise both are required.

post.summary: Inbound bounce webhook (header-auth, preferred). Authenticates via the `X-Envoi-Bounce-Secret` header + provider signature. Public — no bearer / cookie auth.
Inbound bounce webhook for a per-domain SMTP override (header-auth, preferred). Header secret + provider signature; tagged with the domain so audit attributes correctly.

DEPRECATED — use the header-auth variant (`POST /webhooks/bounces/:workspaceId` + `X-Envoi-Bounce-Secret`). The path-style URL leaks the secret into ingress access logs; it remains live for 90 days for existing provider configs.
DEPRECATED per-domain variant of the path-style route. Use the header-auth variant (`POST /webhooks/bounces/:workspaceId/d/:domainId` + `X-Envoi-Bounce-Secret`).

delete.summary: Remove all brand customizations and revert to platform defaults.

get.summary: Get the resolved brand tokens for the workspace. Always returns a complete object, with platform defaults filling in any unset fields.

400.description: Validation failure on the brand payload.

put.summary: Replace the workspace brand. Any field omitted from the body is reset to the platform default for that field. To partially-update, send back what GET returned with the desired diff applied.

get.summary: List domains registered to this workspace

400.description: Validation failure on the request body.

post.summary: Register a domain for a workspace

404.description: Domain not found in this workspace.

409.description: Domain has existing mailboxes; delete them first

delete.summary: Delete a domain (must have no mailboxes left).

404.description: Domain not found in this workspace.

get.summary: Get a single domain (with DNS instructions).

400.description: Validation failure on the request body.

404.description: Domain not found in this workspace.

patch.summary: Update user-side domain metadata (today: dnsProvider; the wizard saves the user's provider choice here so hostnames render correctly across reloads).

404.description: No per-domain override to delete

delete.summary: Drop the per-domain override; sends from this domain fall back to the workspace default (or shared relay).

get.summary: Get the per-domain SMTP override (returns null if unset; the workspace default applies in that case).

404.description: Domain not found in this workspace.

put.summary: Create or update the per-domain SMTP override (resets verification)

404.description: No per-domain override saved

post.summary: Test the per-domain SMTP override; updates status

400.description: Verification failed — one or more required records are still missing or wrong.

404.description: Domain not found in this workspace.

post.summary: Run a synchronous DNS check against this domain; flips status to active when the required record set passes.

get.description: Returns one entry per connected provider (GitHub, …). No secrets in the response — only public identifiers + status + sync stamps.
get.summary: List connected workspace integrations.

post.description: The frontend redirects the user to `authorize_url`; GitHub bounces back to the `/callback` endpoint with a `code` + `state` pair. state is single-use, 5-minute TTL.
post.summary: Mint a GitHub OAuth state token and return the authorize URL.

get.summary: List repos visible to the connected GitHub account.
List branches for the given repo.

put.summary: Set the repo + branch + templates path to sync from.

post.summary: Trigger an immediate sync from GitHub. Returns a sync id to poll.

404.description: Run not found or expired.

get.summary: Poll a sync run's status.

delete.description: Hard delete — the encrypted blob is removed. The customer must reconnect via the provider-specific OAuth flow to restore access.

parameters.description: Optional client-supplied key to make the disconnect idempotent.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

delete.summary: Disconnect an integration. Deletes the credential row.

get.description: Includes the provider's `credentials_redacted` view. Secret fields (access tokens, signing keys) are never included.

404.description: No integration of the requested provider for this workspace.

get.summary: Get a single integration detail with redacted credentials.

403.description: Caller lacks `mail.read` permission, or workspace has not enabled the `mail` service.

get.summary: List mailboxes in this workspace. 20 per page by default (max 200) — paginate with the cursor returned in `pagination.next_cursor` while `pagination.has_more` is true.

400.description: Validation failure (invalid local part, retention out of range).

403.description: Caller lacks `mail.create` permission, or workspace has not enabled the `mail` service.

404.description: Domain not found in this workspace.

409.description: Mailbox local-part already exists on this domain, or the domain is not yet verified.

422.description: Local part or retention rejected by service-layer validation.

post.summary: Create a mailbox under a verified domain. Local-part + domain combination must be globally unique.

404.description: Mailbox not found in this workspace.

delete.summary: Soft-delete a mailbox. The row is marked deleted and stops accepting new mail; existing messages are kept until retention purges them.

404.description: Mailbox not found in this workspace.

get.summary: Get one mailbox by id.

400.description: Validation failure or invalid status transition.

404.description: Mailbox not found in this workspace.

422.description: Retention or status rejected by service-layer validation.

patch.summary: Update mailbox display name, retention, or status. Status transitions are restricted (active ↔ suspended; archived is terminal).

parameters.description: Only include messages received on or after this ISO date
parameters.name: since

parameters.description: Only include messages received on or before this ISO date
parameters.name: until

parameters.description: Filter to only unread (true) or only read (false) messages
parameters.name: unread

404.description: Mailbox not found in this workspace.

get.summary: List messages in a mailbox

404.description: Message not found
Message not found

get.summary: Get a single message (metadata)

404.description: Attachment not found

get.summary: Stream a single attachment by its position

404.description: Message not found

get.summary: Stream the raw RFC5322 .eml for a message

404.description: Message not found

post.summary: Mark a message as read

delete.summary: RTBF: delete every message log row for `recipient` (case-insensitive). Returns the deleted-row count.

parameters.description: Substring filter on subject (case-insensitive, max 200 chars).
parameters.name: subject_contains

get.summary: List outbound messages with cursor pagination

parameters.description: Substring filter on subject (case-insensitive, max 200 chars).
parameters.name: subject_contains

200.description: text/csv stream with one header row + one row per message. Content-Disposition: attachment.

429.description: Another export is already running, or this workspace has hit the hourly export cap.

get.summary: Stream the filtered message log as CSV. Same filters as GET /messages. Body columns are intentionally omitted; bodies remain gated by `envoi.message.body.read`. Rate-limited 1 concurrent + 5/hour per workspace.
Read this workspace's outbound-message settings. Absent → defaults (redact_bodies: false).

patch.summary: Update this workspace's outbound-message settings. Gated on `envoi.message.delete` — same privilege bar as RTBF, since both touch the PII boundary.

get.description: Returns dense day buckets in [since, until). `metric=sent` (default) reads received messages; `metric=bounced` reads MX-time rejections matched to this workspace by envelope-to.

parameters.description: Bucket size. Only `day` is supported today; the param is here so future hour/week additions don’t break clients.
parameters.name: granularity

parameters.description: Inclusive start of the window (ISO-8601). Treated in UTC for bucket alignment.
parameters.name: since

parameters.description: Which counter to bucket. `sent` (default) reads from received messages; `bounced` reads from MX-time rejections matching this workspace's mailbox addresses.
parameters.name: metric

get.summary: Day-bucketed message volume for a workspace

404.description: Not found.

get.summary: Get a single outbound message (metadata + delivery verdicts; body not included). Use /:id/body for cleartext content.

404.description: Not found.

get.summary: Get the cleartext body of an outbound message. Gated by `envoi.message.body.read` (admin+ by default; not granted to plain members).

404.description: No SMTP config to delete

delete.summary: Revert the workspace to the shared SMTP relay

get.summary: Get the workspace-default SMTP config (returns null if unset). Per-domain overrides live under /workspaces/:id/domains/:domainId/smtp-config.

put.summary: Create or update the workspace-default SMTP config (resets verification)

400.description: Validation failure on the request body.

post.summary: Test arbitrary SMTP creds without persisting

404.description: No SMTP config saved

post.summary: Test the persisted workspace-default SMTP config; updates status

get.summary: List every SMTP config in the workspace (default + per-domain overrides)
List suppressed recipients in the workspace (most-recent first, capped at 500).

422.description: Email address rejected as invalid by the service layer.

post.summary: Add an email to the workspace suppression list

404.description: Email is not on this workspace suppression list.

delete.summary: Remove an address from the workspace suppression list.

get.summary: List templates / layouts / partials in a workspace. Filter via ?kind=template|layout|partial (default: all). Filter by tags via ?tags=foo,bar (comma-separated).

post.summary: Create or update a template, layout, or partial. Idempotent on (workspace_id, name); `kind` cannot change after the first upsert.

Lint a draft for deliverability red flags. Same render pipeline as /preview; returns a 0-100 score (higher is better) and a sorted list of findings (errors first). Self-developed heuristic linter, no external classifier — runs in-process.
Preview an unsaved draft. Renders subject + bodyHtml against the workspace brand tokens + supplied data, with all workspace layouts/partials registered. Used by the editor for live preview.

get.summary: Distinct tag list across all templates in this workspace (for autocomplete)

404.description: Template not found in this workspace.

delete.summary: Delete a template, layout, or partial by name.

404.description: Template not found in this workspace.

get.summary: Get a template, layout, or partial by name.

404.description: Template not found in this workspace.

409.description: Cannot render a layout/partial — only sendable templates.

post.summary: Render a saved template against a data payload. Returns subject + html + text without sending.

parameters.description: Opaque client-generated string (1–256 chars, `[A-Za-z0-9_-:]`) used to deduplicate retries within a 24h window.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

403.description: From-address domain is not registered to this workspace.

404.description: Template not found in this workspace.

409.description: IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REUSE — same key, different body — or domain not yet verified.

422.description: Recipient suppressed, render failure, or invalid from address.

post.summary: Send a template-rendered message. Pass an `Idempotency-Key` header (1..256 chars, [A-Za-z0-9_\-:]) to make retries safe — replays return the original response with `Idempotent-Replay: true` for 24h. Same key + different request body returns 409 IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REUSE.

400.description: Validation failure (malformed body, batch too large).

404.description: Template not found in this workspace.

post.summary: Send up to 100 messages with the same template in one request. Per-row partial-success: each row carries its own status (`accepted` | `rejected`). Pass `idempotency_key` per row to make retries safe — same Redis namespace as the request-header path on /send.

403.description: From-address domain is not registered to this workspace.

404.description: Template not found in this workspace.

409.description: Cannot test-send a layout/partial; or domain not yet verified.

422.description: Invalid from address or render failure.

post.summary: Send a test rendering of the template to an arbitrary recipient. Bypasses suppression-list and rate-limit checks; subject is auto-prefixed with [TEST]; missing variables render as [varname] placeholders.

404.description: Template not found in this workspace.

get.summary: Variables auto-detected from the saved template body + subject (Handlebars expressions, dotted paths preserved, dedup'd in first-occurrence order).

List the workspace default + every per-domain override. Plaintext signing secrets are NOT returned — only the last-4-char hint. Mint or rotate via the secret endpoints to receive the plaintext (once).
Recent delivery attempts across all of this workspace's webhook configs. Includes status code, latency, response body (truncated to 1KB), and error if any.

200.description: Workspace-default config, or null if not configured.

get.summary: Get the workspace-default webhook config (returns null if unset).

400.description: Validation failure (bad URL or event-type set).

422.description: URL failed SSRF + reachability checks at config time.

put.summary: Create or replace the workspace-default outbound webhook. Returns the plaintext signing secret ONCE — store it now.

404.description: No webhook configured to rotate.

post.summary: Rotate the workspace-default webhook signing secret. Previous secret remains valid for 24h. Plaintext returned once.

200.description: Per-domain override, or null if not configured.

get.summary: Get the per-domain webhook override (returns null if unset).

400.description: Validation failure (bad URL or event-type set).

422.description: URL failed SSRF + reachability checks at config time.

put.summary: Create or replace the per-domain webhook override. Returns the plaintext signing secret ONCE — store it now.

404.description: No per-domain webhook configured to rotate.

post.summary: Rotate the per-domain webhook signing secret. Previous secret remains valid for 24h. Plaintext returned once.
